response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned, versatile engineer with strong software craftsmanship and some genuine high-performance systems experience, but his professional C++ exposure is limited to a brief 7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a university thesis project. His career since has centered on web and full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang), with no evidence of industrial automation, IEC 62443/SDL practices, MQTT, or message-broker-based C++ systems that this role requires as core competencies.
strengths: Nearly 20 years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems work (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong quality mindset: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, testing tools authorship, and mentoring/teaching track record
concerns: Minimal and dated professional C++ experience; C++ is the core requirement of the role
No industrial automation, IEC 62443, SDL, MQTT, or OT-protocol background
Recent focus is full-stack web and AI tooling, a significant domain shift from industrial platform development
